

Aagesen, L., Salariato, D.L., Scataglini, M.A., Acosta, J.M., Denham,
S.S. & Delfini, C. (2024) [Spatial phylogenetics of grasses in the
southern cone provides insights into ecology and evolution of the family
in south america](https://doi.org/10.1111/jse.13067). *Journal of
Systematics and Evolution*, **62**, 1177--1192.

Ali, M., Huang, Z., Bai, Y., Tng, D.Y.P., Qin, F. & Fang, Z. (2024) [A
multifaceted approach to expanding conservation efforts in the
pan-himalayan landscape](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jclepro.2024.143783).
*Journal of Cleaner Production*, **476**, 143783.

Aragón-Parada, J., Munguía-Lino, G., De-Nova, J.A., Carrillo-Reyes, P.,
Rodríguez, A. & Salinas-Rodríguez, M.M. (2024) [Priority areas for
conservation of the vascular flora in the sierra madre del sur,
mexico](https://doi.org/10.1590/1676-0611-bn-2024-1648). *Biota
Neotropica*, **24**.

Estrada-Sánchez, I., Espejo-Serna, A., García-Cruz, J. & López-Ferrari,
A.R. (2024) [Richness, distribution, and endemism of neotropical
subtribe ponerinae (orchidaceae,
epidendreae)](https://doi.org/10.1007/s40415-024-01005-y). *Brazilian
Journal of Botany*, **47**, 501--517.

Flanagan, T., Shea, G.M., Roll, U., Tingley, R., Meiri, S. & Chapple,
D.G. (2024) [New data and taxonomic changes influence our understanding
of biogeographic patterns: A case study in australian
skinks](https://doi.org/10.1111/jzo.13173). *Journal of Zoology*,
**323**, 317--330.

Flores‐Tolentino, M., Villaseñor, J.L., Ibarra‐Manríquez, G., Rodríguez,
R.R., Morales‐Linares, J. & Dorado, Ó. (2024) [The use of ecological
niche models improves biogeographic regionalization of the balsas
depression, mexico](https://doi.org/10.1111/jvs.13261). *Journal of
Vegetation Science*, **35**.

Folk, R.A., Maassoumi, A.A., Siniscalchi, C.M., Kates, H.R., Soltis,
D.E., Soltis, P.S., Belitz, M.B. & Guralnick, R.P. (2024) [Phylogenetic
diversity and regionalization in the temperate arid
zone](https://doi.org/10.1111/jse.13077). *Journal of Systematics and
Evolution*, **62**, 1201--1217.

Folk, R.A., Siniscalchi, C.M., Doby, J., Kates, H.R., Manchester, S.R.,
Soltis, P.S., Soltis, D.E., Guralnick, R.P. & Belitz, M. (2024) [Spatial
phylogenetics of fagales: Investigating drivers of temperate forest
distributions](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.14840). *Journal of
Biogeography*, **51**, 1518--1532.

Gómez‐Martínez, R.F., Matamoros, W.A., Hoagstrom, C.W., López‐Vila, J.M.
& Bonilla, E.P.D. de (2024) [Phylogenetic diversity of live‐bearing
fishes (poeciliidae) peaks on peninsulas, isthmuses, and in
deserts](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.15066). *Journal of Biogeography*,
**52**, 641--656.

Gómez‐Martínez, R.F., Matamoros, W.A., Hoagstrom, C.W., López‐Vila, J.M.
& Bonilla, E.P.D. de (2024) [Phylogenetic diversity of live‐bearing
fishes (poeciliidae) peaks on peninsulas, isthmuses, and in
deserts](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.15066). *Journal of Biogeography*,
**52**, 641--656.

Hazzi, N. & Hormiga, G. (2024) [Systematics, distribution patterns and
historical biogeography of the central america wandering spider genus
kiekie polotow &amp; brescovit, 2018 (araneae:
ctenidae)](https://doi.org/10.7717/peerj.17242). *PeerJ*, **12**, 17242.

[Insect decline and conservation in the
neotropics](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-49255-6) (2024) Springer
International Publishing.

Kherlenchimeg, N., Burenbaatar, G., Baasanmunkh, S., Tsegmed, Z.,
Urgamal, M., Bau, T., Han, S.-K., Oh, S.-Y. & Choi, H.J. (2024)
[Improved understanding of the macrofungal diversity of mongolia:
Species richness, conservation status, and an annotated
checklist](https://doi.org/10.1080/12298093.2023.2297485).
*Mycobiology*, **52**, 13--29.

Li, Y., Liu, F., Zhou, Y., Liu, X. & Wang, Q. (2024) [Large-scale
geographic patterns and environmental and anthropogenic drivers of
wetland plant diversity in the qinghai-tibet
plateau](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12862-024-02263-w). *BMC Ecology and
Evolution*, **24**.

LÓPEZ-PÉREZ, J.D., ZAMUDIO, S., MUNGUÍA-LINO, G. & RODRÍGUEZ, A. (2024)
[Species richness, geographic distribution and endemism of pinguicula
(lentibulariaceae) in the mexican transition
zone](https://doi.org/10.11646/phytotaxa.641.1.3). *Phytotaxa*, **641**,
31--46.

Machado, V.R., Pereira, M.J.R., Tirelli, F.P., Bennet, D. & Ferrari, A.
(2024) [Endemism and regionalization of neotropical mammals: A
multi-taxon analysis](https://doi.org/10.1093/jmammal/gyae055). *Journal
of Mammalogy*, **105**, 792--808.

Mikryukov, V., Abarenkov, K., Laffan, S., Robertson, T., McTavish, E.J.,
Jeppesen, T.S., Waller, J., Blissett, M., Kõljalg, U. & Miller, J.T.
(2024) [PhyloNext: A pipeline for phylogenetic diversity analysis of
GBIF-mediated data](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12862-024-02256-9). *BMC
Ecology and Evolution*, **24**.

Omollo, W.O., Rabarijaona, R.N., Ranaivoson, R.M., Rakotoarinivo, M.,
Barrett, R.L., Zhang, Q., Lai, Y.-J., Ye, J.-F., Le, C.T., Antonelli,
A., Chen, Z.-D., Liu, B. & Lu, L.-M. (2024) [Spatial heterogeneity of
neo- and paleo-endemism for plants in
madagascar](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cub.2024.02.023). *Current
Biology*, **34**, 1271-1283-4.

Pérez-Aragón, M., Escribano, R., Rivera, R. & Hidalgo, P. (2024)
[Biodiversity patterns of epipelagic copepods in the south pacific
ocean: Strengths and limitations of current data
bases](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0306440). *PLOS ONE*,
**19**, 0306440.

Pío-León, J.F., Munguía-Lino, G., González-Gallegos, J.G. &
González-Elizondo, M. (2024) [Priority areas for conservation based on
endemic vascular plant species and their biocultural attributes: A case
study in sinaloa,
mexico](https://doi.org/10.22201/ib.20078706e.2024.95.5446). *Revista
Mexicana de Biodiversidad*, **95**, 955446.

Qian, H., Mishler, B.D., Zhang, J. & Qian, S. (2024) [Global patterns
and ecological drivers of taxonomic and phylogenetic endemism in
angiosperm genera](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.pld.2023.11.004). *Plant
Diversity*, **46**, 149--157.

Radbouchoom, S., Angeles, M.D. delos, Phutthai, T. & Schneider, H.
(2024) [Towards zero extinction---a case study focusing on the plant
genus begonia in thailand](https://doi.org/10.1002/inc3.67).
*Integrative Conservation*.

Revollo-Cadima, S.G. & Salazar-Bravo, J. (2024) [Identifying areas of
conservation importance based on spatial patterns of evolutionary
diversity for non-volant small mammals in the andean
puna](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jaridenv.2024.105230). *Journal of Arid
Environments*, **224**, 105230.

Rodríguez, A., López-Pérez, J.D. & Munguía-Lino, G. (2024) [A new
species of tigridia and species richness and endemism distribution of
the tribe tigridieae (iridaceae) in the sierra madre del sur,
mexico](https://doi.org/10.1600/036364424x17151801116394). *Systematic
Botany*, **49**, 295--317.

Ruiz-Flores, S.I. & Castro-Castro, A. (2024) [Distribución, riqueza,
endemismo y conservación del género dasylirion (asparagaceae,
convallarioideae)](https://doi.org/10.21829/abm131.2024.2367). *Acta
Botanica Mexicana*.

Sánchez-Romero, A. & Aragón-Parada, J. (2024) [Riqueza de especies,
endemismo y evaluación del riesgo de extinción del género
&lt;em&gt;bursera&lt;/em&gt; (burseraceae) en la península de baja
california](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.3467). *Botanical Sciences*,
**102**, 796--811.

Sandoval-Mata, T.N., Hernández-Sandoval, L., Munguía-Lino, G.,
Steinmann, V.W. & Delgado-Salinas, A. (2024) [Regionalización de la
provincia del desierto chihuahuense con base en la distribución de
especies de &lt;em&gt;dalea&lt;/em&gt;
(fabaceae)](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.3462). *Botanical Sciences*,
**102**, 975--994.

Saqib, S., Liu, Y., Ye, J., Omollo, W.O., Lu, L., Hu, H., Zhang, Q.,
Liu, B., Ahmad, M., Shinwari, Z.K. & Chen, Z. (2024) [Identifying
conservation priority areas using spatial phylogenetic approaches in
west himalaya](https://doi.org/10.30848/pjb2024-3(42)). *Pakistan
Journal of Botany*, **56**.

Urgamal, M., Baasanmunkh, S., Tsegmed, Z., Oyuntsetseg, B.,
Javzandolgor, C., Yu, S.-X., Yoon, J.-W., Cygan, M.G.W. & Choi, H.J.
(2024) [Spatial pattern analysis and conservation assessment of apiaceae
in mongolia](https://doi.org/10.3390/plants13182635). *Plants*, **13**,
2635.

Volis, S., Depalle, F., Khassanov, F., Yusupov, Z. & Deng, T. (2024)
[\_Oncocyclus\_ irises: Phylogeny, evolutionary history and revised
taxonomy based on complete chloroplast genome
sequences](https://botany.uz/uz/2024/11/20/oncocyclus-irises-phylogeny-evolutionary-history-and-revised-taxonomy-based-on-complete-chloroplast-genome-sequences/).
*Plant Diversity of Central Asia*, **3**, 1--66.

Yao, R., Gao, J., Heinrich, M., Yu, S., Xue, T., Zhang, B., Wei, X., Qi,
Y. & Gao, W. (2024) [Medicinal plants used by minority ethnic groups in
china: Taxonomic diversity and conservation
needs](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jep.2024.118573). *Journal of
Ethnopharmacology*, **334**, 118573.
